title: equisetum ramosissimum var. scabrum
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. scabrum, also known as Scabby Horsetail, is a plant species in the Equisetaceae family, characterized by its distinctive horsetail-like appearance and scaly rhizomes. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum var. scabrum include the potential treatment of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and inflammation-related conditions, as well as its use as an antioxidant and anti-aging agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture by herbalists, who value its medicinal properties and recommend it for internal use under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
